items.title: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
items.summary: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.

items.title: "If She Didn't Like Ketan...": Pune Fort Murder Accused's Brother To Cops
items.summary: Police allege that Ketan Agarwal was pushed off a cliff at Lohagad Fort on June 18 by his fiance Siya Goyal, 20 and her alleged lover Chetan Chaudhary, 22.
